TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Dave Allen == kawas tay 1958, Dave Allen, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux nya Allen htgan ru mrkyas beh Naperville, Illinois. hiya mason pqwasan biru maki Naperville, Central . maki qasa hiya "Groover" lalu nya. suruw lga, "Gruber" lalu nya. mincyogun nya hiya ga semon hmyapas squliq. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == *a*e allen == kawas~…ï taj ****, *a*e allen, s~…ïquliq na Œ≤u≈ãe î. qjanux nja allen ƒßt…£an ru mrkjas~…ï Œ≤eƒß naper*ille, illinois~…ï. ƒßija mas~…ïon pqwas~…ïan Œ≤iru maki naper*ille, ¶~ ®entral . maki qas~…ïa ƒßija "…£roo*er" lalu nja. s~…ïuruw l…£a, "…£ruŒ≤er" lalu nja. min ¶~ ®jo…£un nja ƒßija …£a s~…ïemon ƒßmjapas~…ï s~…ïquliq. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ï
S.FORM: == Dave Allen == kawas tay 1958, Dave Allen, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux nya Allen htgan ru mrkyas beh Naperville, Illinois. hiya mason pqwasan biru maki Naperville, Central . maki qasa hiya "Groover" lalu nya. suruw lga, "Gruber" lalu nya. mincyogun nya hiya ga semon hmyapas squliq. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
